commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: None. Idolatry shall not be re-established.

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content: Listen to the same prophet: “At that time,” the Lord says, “the iniquity of Israel shall be sought for and there shall be none, and the sin of Judah and there shall be none found.” - "Against the Pelagians 2.29"
